title.en: Medical electrical equipment - Part 2-36: Particular requirements for the basic safety and essential performance of equipment for extracorporeally induced lithotripsy
title.zh: 医用电气设备 - 第2-36部分：体外引发的碎石设备的基本安全和基本性能专用要求

standards.abstract: Particular requirements for extracorporeal lithotripsy equipment.
